╚══════════════════════════════════════════════════╝

legend:
  ^  Groceries: A category invented to serve as a roof.
  ii Produce: Apples, lettuce.
  ii Dairy: Milk, cheese.
  ii Pantry: Rice, salt.
  _  Errand: An invented framing layer.

───────────────────────────────── built with _ii^ ──
